title: Section 3
content: In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires,-- (a) "Fund" means the Fund of the Institute referred to in section 16; (b) "Governing Body" means the Governing Body of the Institute; (c) "Institute" means the institution known as the Jawaharlal Institute of Post-Graduate Medical Education and Research, Puducherry, incorporated under this Act; (d) "member" means a member of the Institute; (e) "prescribed" means prescribed by rules made under this Act; (f) "specified" means specified by regulations made under this Act.
